subject: English
title: In the Kingdom of Fools – Easy Short Notes

key_points: The story is written by A.K. Ramanujan
It is a Kannada folktale retold in English
The kingdom is ruled by a foolish king and his minister
The king orders people to work at night and sleep during the day
The guru and his disciple visit the kingdom
characters: The King – A foolish ruler who makes strange laws
The Minister – Supports the king’s foolish decisions
The Guru – A wise teacher who recognises danger
The Disciple – Greedy and ignores the guru’s warning
themes: Wisdom is more important than foolish authority
Wise leadership is essential for a stable society
literary_devices: Satire – The story mocks foolish rulers and unjust systems
Irony – The king becomes the victim of his own foolish decision
exam_tips: Remember that everything in the market costs one duddu
Focus on the guru’s wisdom and the disciple’s greed
Explain how the guru tricks the king
Mention that the guru restores normal day and night
